\tzpentry{ID4750}{Angular Velocity Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4750 introduces Angular Velocity Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\hat{\\Omega}_{n} = \\sum_{a} \\left( \\mathcal{P} \\cdot \\psi_{n}(\\mathbf{r}_a) \\right) \\otimes \\exp\\left( -\\int \\Sigma_{tot}(\\ManifoldL) \\, dz \\right)\n\\end{equation}
